parameters.query:
WITH base as (SELECT 
            p.pedido_id,
            p.cliente_id,
            p.valor_total,
            f.status_pagamento,
            l.transportadora,
            l.status_entrega,
            c.pagina_acessada
            p.anomesdia
        FROM workspace_db.tb_pedidos p
        LEFT JOIN workspace_db.tb_faturamento_cliente f 
            ON p.cliente_id = f.cliente_id
        LEFT JOIN workspace_db.tb_logistica l 
            ON p.pedido_id = l.pedido_id
        LEFT JOIN workspace_db.tb_clickstream c 
            ON p.cliente_id = c.cliente_id
        WHERE 
            p.anomesdia = '{anomesdia}'
            AND f.anomes = '{anomes}'
            AND l.data = '{data}'
            AND c.year = '{year}' AND c.month = '{month}' AND c.day = '{day}')
            select * from base ;

WITH base as (SELECT

            p.cliente_id,
            p.valor_total,
            f.status_pagamento,
            l.transportadora,
            l.status_entrega,
            c.pagina_acessada
            p.anomesdia
        FROM workspace_db.tb_pedidos p
        LEFT JOIN workspace_db.tb_faturamento_cliente f 
            ON p.cliente_id = f.cliente_id
        LEFT JOIN workspace_db.tb_logistica l 
            ON p.pedido_id = l.pedido_id
        LEFT JOIN workspace_db.tb_clickstream c 
            ON p.cliente_id = c.cliente_id
        WHERE 
            p.anomesdia = '{anomesdia}'
            AND f.anomes = '{anomes}'
            AND l.data = '{data}'
            AND c.year = '{year}' AND c.month = '{month}' AND c.day = '{day}')
